narrative:
Elizabeth Township has 1,281 registered voters, with 42.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.1 percentage points.
